modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help adding a book fold in Word document.

full_description_text:  
I’m trying to make my Word document have a book fold, but I don’t know how to do it. I looked around but couldn’t find clear steps. Can someone please explain it simply? I just want my pages to look like a book!
short_description: Need help adding a book fold in Word document.
description: I’m trying to make my Word document have a book fold, but I don’t know how to do it. I looked around but couldn’t find clear steps. Can someone please explain it simply? I just want my pages to look like a book!
